message:
feat(stripe): add CRUD operations, webhook ingestion, idempotency keys, and audit trails

Add 6 new Stripe operations: update_customer, delete_customer,
get_subscription, list_subscriptions, get_invoice, ingest_webhook_event.

- HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verification (StripeWebhookVerifier)
- Idempotency key support on create_customer (none -> strict)
- Audit trail metadata in all mutation responses
- New rate limit pool for webhook ingestion
- Dependencies: hmac, sha2, subtle, hex for webhook security
- 542 lines of integration tests covering all new operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -168,6 +172,105 @@ related = ["stripe.get_customer"]
 
 # ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer"]
+description = "Update a Stripe customer"
+capability = "stripe.write"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".input_schema]
+required = ["customer_id"]
+type = "object"
+anyOf = [{ required = ["email"] }, { required = ["name"] }]
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".input_schema.properties.customer_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".input_schema.properties.email]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".input_schema.properties.name]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".input_schema.properties.idempotency_key]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".output_schema]
+required = ["customer", "audit"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".output_schema.properties.customer]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".output_schema.properties.audit]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.stripe.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.update_customer".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Update customer metadata such as email or name."
+common_mistakes = ["Sending an update without any mutable fields"]
+examples = ['{"customer_id": "cus_abc123", "email": "new@example.com"}']
+related = ["stripe.get_customer", "stripe.create_customer"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer"]
+description = "Delete a Stripe customer"
+capability = "stripe.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".input_schema]
+required = ["customer_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".input_schema.properties.customer_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".input_schema.properties.idempotency_key]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".output_schema]
+required = ["deleted", "audit"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".output_schema.properties.deleted]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".output_schema.properties.audit]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.stripe.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.delete_customer".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Permanently remove a customer object from Stripe."
+common_mistakes = ["Deleting before exporting data needed for audit/reconciliation"]
+examples = ['{"customer_id": "cus_abc123"}']
+related = ["stripe.get_customer"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
 [provides.operations."stripe.create_payment_intent"]
 description = "Create a payment intent"
 capability = "stripe.payment"
@@ -309,7 +412,7 @@ capability = "stripe.payment"

 [provides.operations."stripe.create_subscription".input_schema]

@@ -344,7 +451,99 @@ max_response_bytes = 1048576

-related = ["stripe.cancel_subscription", "stripe.get_customer"]
+related = ["stripe.cancel_subscription", "stripe.get_customer", "stripe.get_subscription"]

+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription"]

+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".input_schema]

+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".input_schema.properties.subscription_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".output_schema]
+required = ["subscription"]

+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".output_schema.properties.subscription]

+
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.stripe.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_subscription".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Check status and billing cycle details for a subscription."
+common_mistakes = []
+examples = ['{"subscription_id": "sub_abc123"}']
+related = ["stripe.create_subscription", "stripe.cancel_subscription"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.list_subscriptions"]
+description = "List subscriptions with optional filters"
+capability = "stripe.read"
+risk_level = "low"

+require_host_canonicalization = true

-idempotency = "none"

 [provides.operations."stripe.cancel_subscription".input_schema]

@@ -434,7 +637,50 @@ max_response_bytes = 5242880

-related = ["stripe.get_customer"]

+type = "object"

+[provides.operations."stripe.get_invoice".output_schema]
+required = ["invoice"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_invoice".output_schema.properties.invoice]

+
+[provides.operations."stripe.get_invoice".network_constraints]

+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0

+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event"]
+description = "Validate and ingest a Stripe webhook payload forwarded by fcp-host"
+capability = "stripe.webhook"
+risk_level = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+requires_approval = "policy"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".input_schema]
+required = ["payload", "stripe_signature"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".input_schema.properties.payload]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".input_schema.properties.stripe_signature]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".input_schema.properties.received_at]
+type = "integer"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".input_schema.properties.delivery_id]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".output_schema]
+required = ["event", "delivery"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".output_schema.properties.event]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".output_schema.properties.delivery]

+
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.stripe.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 1048576
+
+[provides.operations."stripe.ingest_webhook_event".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Process webhook deliveries forwarded by host ingress."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Passing parsed JSON instead of raw payload bytes/string.",
+    "Ignoring duplicate delivery IDs and replay checks.",
+]
+examples = ['{"payload":"{\"id\":\"evt_123\",\"object\":\"event\",\"type\":\"invoice.paid\",\"created\":1700000000,\"data\":{\"object\":{\"id\":\"in_123\",\"object\":\"invoice\"}}}","stripe_signature":"t=1700000000,v1=<hex>"}']
+related = ["stripe.get_invoice", "stripe.get_subscription"]
+
 # ── Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
 [event_caps]
@@ -519,14 +817,27 @@ window_ms = 1000
 burst = 10
 scope = "instance"
 
+[[rate_limits.pools]]
+id = "stripe.webhook"
+requests = 300
+window_ms = 60000
+burst = 60
+scope = "instance"
+
 [rate_limits.operation_pools]
 "stripe.create_customer" = ["stripe.write"]
 "stripe.get_customer" = ["stripe.read"]
 "stripe.list_customers" = ["stripe.read"]
+"stripe.update_customer" = ["stripe.write"]
+"stripe.delete_customer" = ["stripe.write"]
 "stripe.create_payment_intent" = ["stripe.payment"]
 "stripe.get_payment_intent" = ["stripe.read"]
 "stripe.create_refund" = ["stripe.payment"]
 "stripe.create_subscription" = ["stripe.payment"]
+"stripe.get_subscription" = ["stripe.read"]
+"stripe.list_subscriptions" = ["stripe.read"]
 "stripe.cancel_subscription" = ["stripe.payment"]
 "stripe.list_invoices" = ["stripe.read"]
+"stripe.get_invoice" = ["stripe.read"]
 "stripe.get_balance" = ["stripe.read"]
+"stripe.ingest_webhook_event" = ["stripe.webhook"]
